/CAL:I&A, P&C/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/ACM/WS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ONPRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH AGPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/DEF:TO REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR OF RESIDENCE (HOME DETENTION) UNLESS BY A SWORN EMPLOYEE,/DEF:TO HAVE NO NEW CHARGES/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/SA2:350 GOLDEN GATE AVE IN SF, CA/SAORD/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/
